summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of MECON Project Monitoring MVP (16 modules). Backend: 41/41 pytest tests passing on first run (after one test-script fix). Frontend: Login (admin + 6 demo roles), demo-button pre-fill, dashboard KPIs/charts, sidebar navigation across 9 modules, project list (5 seeded codes verified) + project detail with S-curve, action buttons (workflow approve, drawing approve, NCR close, hindrance close, bill advance), notifications panel, logout, protected-route redirect — all functional. RBAC (Contractor blocked on POST /projects and /users) verified. Seed data intact (5 projects, 30 packages, 50 drawings, 150 DPRs, 22 NCRs, 20 hindrances, 28 bills, 35 workflows, 16 notifications).

minor.issue: Pydantic model requires location, start_date, end_date which are not documented in review_request payload example. Returns 422 with clear error — not a bug, but noted for frontend forms / API docs.

ui_bugs.issue: wf-approve / wf-reject / wf-escalate buttons render for ALL rows regardless of workflow status. After an Approve advances stage to 'In Progress' or 'Approved', the action buttons are still shown — should be hidden once status is Approved/Rejected/Closed.

Three KPI data-testids in code differ from review_request spec: kpi-delayed-projects (spec: kpi-critical), kpi-amber-projects (spec: kpi-at-risk), kpi-pending-drawings (spec: kpi-drawings-pending). All KPIs render correctly visually; only the testid naming is inconsistent with spec.

issues: Active Projects KPI text renders concatenated as 'Active Projects6/ 6' with no space between label and value when read via text_content — purely visual spacing is fine in screenshot; minor cosmetic accessibility note.

action_items: [MEDIUM] In Workflows.js, hide wf-approve/reject/escalate buttons when status is in ('Approved','Rejected','Closed') to match the spec and avoid no-op clicks.
[LOW] Align Dashboard KPI data-testid names to spec (kpi-critical, kpi-at-risk, kpi-drawings-pending) OR update the spec — currently mismatched.
[INFO] /api/projects POST contract: ensure any frontend create-project form includes location/start_date/end_date — backend rejects without them (422).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 952 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, projects, drawings, finance, etc.) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
JWT_SECRET is hardcoded in .env as a static string — acceptable for MVP demo but rotate before production.

CORS_ORIGINS='*' in backend/.env while cookies are httpOnly + samesite=lax + credentials. With wildcard origin browsers will reject credentialed cookies; explicit FRONTEND_URL origin should be used in CORS allow_origins for production (Bearer token path still works since localStorage is used).
Workflow / drawing / NCR / hindrance / bill action buttons in pages do not conditionally render based on status — UX issue (see ui_bugs).
All endpoints correctly use async/await and Pydantic validation; MongoDB _id is properly excluded via projections.
RBAC via require_role decorator works correctly (verified: Contractor blocked 403).
test_credentials: admin@mecon.in / Mecon@2026 (admin); pc@mecon.in, site@mecon.in, qaqc@mecon.in, finance@mecon.in / Demo@2026; contractor@lnt.com, client@sail.in / Demo@2026 — all verified working.
seed_data_creation: No seed needed — backend auto-seeds on startup. Verified 5 projects (BSP-EXP-3, RSP-COKE-7, NMDC-IRON, PWR-NTPC, BHEL-MFG) plus 1 test project created by CRUD test (TEST_PRJ_X1).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_mecon_backend.py covers 41 tests across auth, RBAC, seed data, dashboard, project detail, and all action endpoints (workflow/drawing/NCR/hindrance/bill). All pass. Frontend verified via Playwright: all sidebar routes work, action buttons functional. The only real UX bug is Workflows page showing action buttons after status is final — easy fix in Workflows.js. Note: review_request listed some data-testid names that differ from actual code (kpi-critical vs kpi-delayed-projects). When testing frontend, prefer actual data-testids from /app/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.js.
rca of the issue: Workflow action buttons stay visible after approve: In /app/frontend/src/pages/Workflows.js (lines ~74-94) the Approve/Reject/Escalate buttons are rendered unconditionally in every row. Backend correctly updates status to 'In Progress'/'Approved'/'Rejected'/'Escalated' (server.py L513-532) and frontend re-fetches list — but UI does not gate the action buttons by status. Fix: wrap buttons in `{['Pending','In Progress'].includes(w.status) && (...)}` or hide when status in ('Approved','Rejected','Closed').
